creator: tjlegg@gmail.com
text:
While the qt5-network builds with the existing libressl patches, it will not actually provide any ssl functionality with the current security/libressl (2.6.4)

https://github.com/libressl-portable/openbsd/issues/33

Please check openbsd ports cvs for updated patches to qt5-network 5.9.3 for libressl (and possibly other issues)

http://cvsweb.openbsd.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb/ports/x11/qt5/qtbase/patches/
